data_description.password: The password to log in to the OpenWrt router.
data_description.username: The username to log in to the OpenWrt router.

data_description.host: The hostname or IP address of your OpenWrt router.
data_description.password: The password to log in to the OpenWrt router.
data_description.ssl: Whether to connect to the router using SSL.
data_description.username: The username to log in to the OpenWrt router.
data_description.verify_ssl: Whether to verify the router's SSL certificate.

yaml_import_cannot_connect.description:
The YAML configuration for OpenWrt (luci) at `{host}` could not be imported because the connection failed.

Please check that `{host}` is reachable, update your `configuration.yaml` if needed, and restart Home Assistant.
yaml_import_cannot_connect.title: YAML configuration import failed: cannot connect

yaml_import_invalid_auth.description:
The YAML configuration for OpenWrt (luci) at `{host}` could not be imported because the credentials are invalid.

Please update your `configuration.yaml` with valid credentials and restart Home Assistant.
yaml_import_invalid_auth.title: YAML configuration import failed: invalid authentication
